scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
